tasks_completed.changes: Applied executable bit (mode 100644 -> 100755) to both files
tasks_completed.rationale: Scripts without execute permission cannot be run as hooks or commands directly

tasks_completed.changes: Added _cleanup_repo() function with separate EXIT, INT (exit 130), TERM (exit 143) traps after TEST_REPO assignment on line 18. Codex finding incorporated: separate signal traps with proper exit codes so INT/TERM actually terminate the script after cleanup.
tasks_completed.rationale: Without trap, early exits (SIGINT, SIGTERM, set -e failures) leave /tmp/lock-test-repo-$$ behind

tasks_completed.changes: Added _cleanup_work() function with separate EXIT, INT (exit 130), TERM (exit 143) traps after WORK=$(mktemp -d) on line 10. Same codex-improved pattern as Fix 2.
tasks_completed.rationale: Without trap, early exits leave mktemp dir behind in /tmp

tasks_completed.description: Remove stale narrative comments from hooks/smart-checkpoint.sh
tasks_completed.changes: Removed 3-line block: dev subagent rm attempt narrative + manual rm command comment
tasks_completed.rationale: Stale narrative about a blocked rm attempt is not useful documentation; the stub already explains its purpose

tasks_completed.description: Remove stale narrative comments from hooks/ensure-git-repo.sh
tasks_completed.changes: Removed 3-line block: dev subagent rm attempt narrative + manual rm command comment

Removed: pseudocode block (jq commented command + placeholder notes, 6 lines). Updated header from misleading 'Validates slash commands before execution / Exit 2 = block' to factual 'Documentation-only slash-command policy stub. Currently performs no validation and exits 0.' (codex finding 2 incorporated).
tasks_completed.rationale: Header claimed validation behavior the script does not implement; pseudocode was left-over development notes

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: N/A — cleanliness fixes, no single root cause commit
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: Scripts accumulated stale comments from prior dev cycles; chmod bit was missing from initial creation; test scripts lacked trap handlers
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Direct removal of stale narrative blocks; chmod applied; trap handlers added with proper signal-exit semantics

diff_stats.justification_for_overage: Helper function pattern (4 lines each) is the minimum safe implementation for separate INT/TERM traps with proper exit codes, per codex adversarial finding

dev.implementation_summary: Applied 6 cleanliness fixes: chmod 755 on 2 scripts, improved trap cleanup (with proper INT/TERM exit codes) on 2 test scripts, removed stale narrative comments from 2 deprecated hooks, removed pseudocode+misleading header from 1 validate hook.
dev.qa_notes: Verify: (1) ls -la on pre_slashcommand_validate.sh and resolve-close-report.sh shows -rwxr-xr-x; (2) grep trap in both test scripts shows _cleanup functions with separate EXIT/INT/TERM traps; (3) smart-checkpoint.sh and ensure-git-repo.sh no longer contain 'dev subagent' or 'rm ~/.claude/hooks/' narrative lines; (4) pre_slashcommand_validate.sh header reads 'Documentation-only' not 'Validates slash commands'.

self_verification.smoke_check: skipped (bash safety hook blocks test script execution from /dev/shm; files verified via grep/ls)
self_verification.notes: All 6 files verified via ls -la (permissions) and grep (trap lines, stale comment removal confirmed absent). Test scripts could not be executed due to bash safety hook blocking scripts from /dev/shm path.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Finding 1 (in_scope_real_bug): INT/TERM traps cleaned up but did not exit — script could continue after temp dir deleted. Proposed separate trap functions with proper exit codes (130/143). Finding 2 (in_scope_minor): pre_slashcommand_validate.sh header still said 'Validates slash commands' despite being a no-op stub. Finding 3 (OBSERVATION_ONLY): redundant manual rm-rf at script ends, idempotent, not a blocker.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Both Finding 1 and Finding 2 incorporated: trap pattern upgraded to _cleanup function + separate EXIT/INT/TERM traps with exit codes; header updated to 'Documentation-only slash-command policy stub. Currently performs no validation and exits 0.'

recommendations: The SAFE_COMMANDS and ASK_COMMANDS arrays in pre_slashcommand_validate.sh are unused. If the hook is eventually implemented, these arrays are the correct foundation.
The two deprecated hooks (smart-checkpoint.sh, ensure-git-repo.sh) are safe to delete manually when desired.
